mapper.select:
SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID as tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD as agntCd, a.AGNT_NM as agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD as mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM as mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity, ip.INBOUND_STATUS as inboundStatus, ip.EXPECTED_DATE as expectedDate, ip.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, ip.SAVE_USER as saveUser, ip.UPDT_TIME as updtTime, ip.UPDT_USER as updtUser, ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY as actualQuantity, ip.ACTUAL_DATE as actualDate, ip.REMARKS as remarks, ip.COMPLETE_TIME as completeTime, ip.COMPLETE_USER as completeUser, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY as inboundQuantity FROM TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M a ON ip.AGNT_CD = a.AGNT_CD AND ip.CMPY_CD = a.CMPY_CD WHERE 1=1 AND ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N')
AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
AND ip.MTRL_CD IN ( SELECT MTRL_CD FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND BARCODE = #{barcode} )
ORDER BY ip.EXPECTED_DATE ASC, ip.SAVE_TIME ASC OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pageSize} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT SET ACTUAL_QUANTITY = #{actualQuantity}, ACTUAL_DATE = #{actualDate}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, VHCL_TON_TYPE = #{vhclTonType}, IN_METHOD = #{inMethod}, PALLET_QTY = #{palletQty}, INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETE', COMPLETE_TIME = GETDATE(), COMPLETE_USER = #{completeUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{completeUser} WHERE TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID AS tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, am.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID AS tblMtrlMId FROM sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M am ON am.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND am.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD WHERE ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = #{tblInboundProductId} AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ip.DELETED_YN = 'N'

update.foreach:
-- TBL_MTRL_M의 CURRENT_QUANTITY 업데이트 (MTO가 아닌 상품만) UPDATE sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_MTRL_M SET CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + #{item.actualQuantity}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{item.completeUser} WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N' -- MTO가 아닌 상품만 재고 관리
-- 재고 변동 이력 기록 INSERT INTO sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) SELECT #{item.cmpyCd}, #{item.agntCd}, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd}), TBL_MTRL_M_ID, #{item.mtrlCd}, #{item.mtrlNm}, 'INBOUND', ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) - #{item.actualQuantity}, #{item.actualQuantity}, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0), '입고완료-자동증가', #{item.actualDate}, GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, GETDATE(), #{item.completeUser}, 'N' FROM sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{item.cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{item.agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{item.mtrlCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'

mapper.select:
SELECT ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID AS tblInboundProductId, ip.CMPY_CD AS cmpyCd, ip.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, a.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, ip.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, ip.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, ip.TBL_MTRL_M_ID AS tblMtrlMId, ip.INBOUND_QUANTITY AS inboundQuantity, ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY AS actualQuantity, -- [추가] 이미 적치된 총 수량 계산 ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0) AS totalPutawayQty, -- [추가] 적치해야 할 남은 수량 계산 (ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) AS remainingQty, CONVERT(varchar(10), ip.ACTUAL_DATE, 23) AS actualDate, CONVERT(varchar(19), ip.COMPLETE_TIME, 120) AS completeTime, ip.COMPLETE_USER AS completeUser, ip.VHCL_TON_TYPE AS vhclTonType, ip.IN_METHOD AS inMethod, ip.PALLET_QTY AS palletQty, ip.REMARKS AS remarks FROM sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT ip LEFT JOIN sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_AGENCY_M a ON a.CMPY_CD = ip.CMPY_CD AND a.AGNT_CD = ip.AGNT_CD -- [조인 추가] 적치 이력 테이블에서 상품별 적치 합계 가져오기 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID, SUM(PUTAWAY_QTY) AS TOTAL_PUT_QTY -- 실제 적치 수량 컬럼명에 맞춰 수정 필요 FROM sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_WH_PUT_H GROUP BY TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID ) ph ON ip.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID = ph.TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID WHERE ip.INBOUND_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND (ip.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ip.DELETED_YN = 'N') -- 남은 수량이 0보다 큰 것만 조회 (전부 적치된 것은 목록에서 제외) AND (ip.ACTUAL_QUANTITY - ISNULL(ph.TOTAL_PUT_QTY, 0)) > 0
AND ip.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
AND COMPLETE_TIME >= CAST(#{date} AS date)
ORDER BY ip.COMPLETE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sonictmsdev_mssql.dbo.TBL_WH_PUT_H ( CMPY_CD, WH_CD, TBL_INBOUND_PRODUCT_ID, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, PUTAWAY_QTY, LOT_NO, EXPIRE_DATE, PUTAWAY_TIME, PUTAWAY_USER, REMARKS, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( #{cmpyCd}, #{whCd}, #{tblInboundProductId}, #{zoneId}, #{locId}, #{putawayQty}, #{lotNo}, #{expireDate, jdbcType=DATE}, GETDATE(), #{putawayUser}, #{remarks}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 l.LOC_ID AS locId, l.WH_CD AS whCd, l.LOC_CD AS locCd, l.LOC_NM AS locNm FROM dbo.TBL_WH_LOC_M l WHERE l.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND l.ZONE_ID = #{zoneId} AND l.USE_YN = 'Y' AND l.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY l.LOC_ID
